description: Style NoteHitting all the season's fashion notes right, this pair of sandals from catwalk is a closet essential that'll go with all your summer favourites. You can wear this to snazz up a simple look, but don't forget to style them with tonal accessories!Product DetailsTapering toed sandal with silver thong style straps with an embellishment at the apex of the strapsPadded beige footbed with printUpper stitched to the outsoleTPU outsole with arrow shaped patterns for tractionMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
